name: Vamsi Kaka
title: Production Coordinator & PRO

bio: Vamsi Kaka is a veteran production coordinator and PRO who has managed over 300 South Indian film productions since 2015. He served as Executive Producer on Ori Devuda (2022) and coordinated major blockbusters including RRR, Baahubali series, and KGF Chapter 2. Associated with leading production houses like Sri Venkateswara Creations and PVP Cinema, he combines production logistics expertise with media relations management. His dual capabilities have made him indispensable for large-scale Telugu productions.
